description: Fill a venue LaTeX template's title / author / affiliation / corresponding-email placeholders via regex substitution and write a customized .tex ready for editing and compilation.
rules: pure Python stdlib — runs fully offline
non-interactive — TEMPLATE is resolved against the vendored assets/{journals,posters,grants} catalog
only TITLE / AUTHORS / AFFILIATIONS / EMAIL placeholders are substituted; unmatched placeholders are left for manual editing
output written to record_store as customized.tex (never overwrites the source template)
usage: Set TEMPLATE (a bundled .tex filename, e.g. nature_article.tex). Optionally set TITLE, AUTHORS, AFFILIATIONS, EMAIL. Output: customized.tex.
limitation: Substitutes only the four placeholder kinds the script knows; templates lacking those exact placeholders are copied through unchanged. Does not compile LaTeX.
